title: Anna McMorrin MP — Campaigns
text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Campaigns 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Campaigns Cost of living My number one priority is cutting the cost of living for people in Cardiff North. Click here to find out more. Environment I have always been an environmental campaigner. Now, I’m working as part of a UK Labour Government, investing in renewable energy and protecting our environment in Wales. Click here to find out more. Girls in Sport There are too many obstacles to women and girls in sport. We need better facilities, education and training. Click here to find out more. Jobs and Growth Two Labour governments are investing in opportunities like AI and renewable energy, creating jobs and economic growth in Wales. Click here to find out more. Next Stop My “Next Stop” public transport campaign has secured some major wins on the Coryton Line. Now, I’m calling for a more regular service of four trains per hour. Click here to find out more. Safer Streets The first duty of any government is to keep people safe. Click here to find out more. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.
